name: Solid Carbide Drills
shortDescription: High-performance internal coolant & solid carbide drills for deep hole precision drilling.
fullDescription: ACT High-Performance Solid Carbide Drills are engineered for maximum chip evacuation, precise hole concentricity, and high-feed drilling in steel, stainless steel, cast iron, and hardened alloys up to 65 HRC. Available in 3xD, 5xD, 8xD, and 12xD L/D ratios with custom step-drill configurations built to order.
keyFeatures: Micrograin carbide substrate for exceptional toughness
Special point geometry reducing axial thrust force
Internal coolant hole options for optimal chip clearing
AlTiN / TiAlN PVD multi-layer wear coating

specs.Coating Options: AlTiN, TiAlN, DLC, Uncoated for Aluminum

name: Solid Carbide Endmills
shortDescription: 2, 3, 4 & 6 flute high-speed milling cutters for roughing & finishing operations.
fullDescription: Designed for maximum metal removal rates (MRR) and superior surface finish. ACT Solid Carbide Endmills feature variable helix angles to suppress vibration and chatter during heavy peripheral milling, slotting, and trochoidal milling operations.
keyFeatures: Unequal flute spacing eliminates regenerative chatter
Rigid core diameter design for high side loads
Corner radius options (R0.2 to R3.0) to prevent chipping
High thermal stability coating for dry machining

specs.Hardness Range: Suitable for materials up to 68 HRC

name: Ballnose Endmills
shortDescription: 3D contouring & mold profile milling ball nose endmills with mirror flute finish.
fullDescription: Precision ground 2-flute & 4-flute ball nose endmills built specifically for 3D mold cavity finishing, turbine blade profiling, and complex sculptured surface machining. Micro-mirror edge prep guarantees mirror surface finishes.
keyFeatures: True spherical radius tolerance ±0.003mm
Deep neck clearance for tall rib & pocket milling
Sub-micron carbide grade preventing tip chipping
Heat-resistant PVD coating for high RPM finishing

name: Solid Carbide Reamers
shortDescription: H7/H6 ultra-precision sizing reamers for mirror hole finishing.
fullDescription: ACT Solid Carbide Reamers deliver precise bore tolerances (H6/H7) with mirror surface finish (Ra < 0.2µm). Available in straight flute for blind holes and left-hand spiral for through-hole chip ejection.
keyFeatures: H6 / H7 precision bore sizing in a single pass
Unequal flute indexing to prevent chatter marks
Custom decimal diameter manufacturing to 0.001mm steps
Internal coolant radial outlet options

name: Solid Carbide Boring Bars
shortDescription: Anti-vibration heavy metal & solid carbide boring bars for deep internal turning.
fullDescription: High-rigidity Solid Carbide Internal Boring Bars engineered for high L/D ratio internal threading, grooving, and profiling without chatter vibration. Up to 7xD overhang capability with internal coolant flow.
keyFeatures: Solid carbide shank offering 3x modulus of elasticity over steel
Through-shank internal coolant port directly to cutting edge
Micro-boring inserts and solid carbide indexing heads
Suppresses chatter at deep bore overhang ratios up to 7xD

specs.Shank Diameter: Ø4.0mm to Ø25.0mm Precision Ground h6

name: HoleMills & Interpolation Tools
shortDescription: Helical interpolation milling tools for large diameter hole generation without pre-drilling.
fullDescription: ACT HoleMill Interpolation Cutters enable rapid hole opening from solid stock via CNC helical interpolation. Eliminates the need for multiple drill sizes and reduces spindle load on medium-power VMC machines.
keyFeatures: Single tool generates multiple hole diameters
High feed helical entry geometry
Low cutting force requirement suitable for 40-taper machines
Multi-insert or solid carbide profile design

name: T-Slot Cutters & Woodruff Tools
shortDescription: Solid carbide & brazed T-slot cutters for machine table & keyway milling.
fullDescription: Precision ground T-Slot cutters engineered with staggered teeth to clear chips efficiently during deep slot milling. Custom width and diameter geometries built to DIN 851 & ISO standards.
keyFeatures: Staggered tooth design prevents chip packing
Precision side clearance relief grinding
Solid carbide head with neck reduction for deep slot reach
AlTiN coated for alloy steel slotting

name: Brazed Tip Reamers & Tools
shortDescription: Carbide tipped brazed reamers for cost-effective large diameter reaming.
fullDescription: Heavy-duty steel shank reamers with induction-brazed micrograin carbide cutting tips. Offers the wear resistance of solid carbide at a lower cost for diameters above Ø16mm.
keyFeatures: High strength silver-brazed carbide tips
Regrindable multiple times to extend service life
Available with expanding blade diameter adjustment
Custom step and pilot reamer combinations

name: Corner Radius & Chamfer Tools
shortDescription: Front & back chamfering tools, corner rounding cutters & edge deburring mills.
fullDescription: Complete range of solid carbide chamfer mills (60°, 90°, 120°) and concave corner rounding cutters. Enables clean 5-axis edge chamfering and deburring in a single CNC pass.
keyFeatures: Double-ended chamfer mills for front and backside deburring
Precision ground concave radius profile R0.5 to R6.0
4-flute design for fast feed rate edge breaking
Vibration-free chatterless chamfering

name: Lollipop & 5-Axis Cutters
shortDescription: 220° spherical lollipop endmills for undercut milling & 5-axis port deburring.
fullDescription: Specialized spherical cutters with neck diameter smaller than ball head diameter, allowing 220° to 300° wrap-around spherical machining for cylinder head intake ports, internal undercuts, and impellers.
keyFeatures: 220° Spherical ball head clearance
Slim neck design prevents collision in deep cavities
Ideal for multi-axis simultaneous contouring
Micro-grain carbide with friction-free PVD coating

name: Custom Profile Form Tools
shortDescription: 100% custom profile ground tools tailored to customer component drawings.
fullDescription: ACT specializes in custom solid carbide form tools designed to machine complex multi-step, radius, and chamfer profiles in a single pass. Drastically reduces cycle times on CNC turning centers and VMCs.
keyFeatures: Designed directly from customer 2D/3D CAD drawings
Optical profile projector ground to ±0.002mm contour accuracy
Combines drilling, step-counterboring, and chamfering in 1 tool
Full PVD re-coating support

name: Turning Tool Holders & Inserts
shortDescription: CNC Lathe external & internal turning toolholders, boring bars, and carbide inserts.
fullDescription: Complete trading inventory of ISO standard CNC lathe tool holders (PCLNR, SDJCR, SER, SIR), parting/grooving blocks, and indexable carbide inserts (CNMG, DNMG, WNMG, CCMT, VBMT) from leading brands.
keyFeatures: Precision heat-treated steel shank holders
High clamping rigidity for heavy rough turning
PVD & CVD coated carbide insert grades for steel/stainless
Ready stock in Bangalore warehouse

name: Indexable Milling Cutters
shortDescription: Face mills, shoulder mills & high-feed indexable milling bodies with carbide inserts.
fullDescription: Industrial trading portfolio of 45° face milling cutters, 90° square shoulder mills (APMT 1135 / 1604), and high-feed button mills (RDMT) for heavy metal removal in large die blocks.
keyFeatures: Nickel-plated anti-corrosion cutter bodies
Differential pitch insert spacing suppresses chatter
Internal air/coolant nozzle to each insert seat
High metal removal rates at elevated feeds

name: Measuring Instruments & Metrology
shortDescription: Digital Vernier calipers, micrometers, dial indicators & bore gauges for QC inspection.
fullDescription: Authorized supplier of precision metrology instruments including IP67 Digital Calipers (0-150mm, 0-300mm), Outside Micrometers (0.001mm accuracy), Dial Bore Gauges, and Height Gauges for machine shop quality control.
keyFeatures: IP67 Coolant-proof digital calipers
Calibration certificates provided
Stainless steel hardened measuring jaws
Mitutoyo & Baker equivalent precision quality
